name: toast
title: Toast
description: Terminal-styled toast notification system. Imperative toast() API callable from anywhere. Supports variant shortcuts, promise handling, and position-aware animations.

Auto-dismiss delay in ms. When `action` is set and duration is omitted, the toast persists indefinitely (WCAG 2.2.1 — enough time).
Fallback timeout for reduced-motion: onAnimationEnd won't fire when
motion-safe:animate-* classes are suppressed by prefers-reduced-motion.

docs.description: Terminal-styled toast notification system. Imperative toast() API callable from anywhere. Supports variant shortcuts, promise handling, and position-aware animations.

notes.title: Imperative API
notes.content: Call toast(), toast.success(), toast.error(), toast.warning(), toast.info(), or toast.loading() from any code — no provider required. Place a <Toaster /> component in your app layout to render toasts.

notes.title: Promise Support
notes.content: toast.promise(asyncFn, { loading, success, error }) shows a loading toast that updates to success or error when the promise resolves.

notes.title: Loading Toasts
notes.content: Loading toasts show a braille spinner and don't auto-dismiss. Use toast.loading() for manual control, or toast.promise() for automatic lifecycle.

notes.title: Error Toasts Persist
notes.content: Toasts with variant='error' do not auto-dismiss. Users must manually close them.

notes.title: Keyboard
notes.content: Press Escape to dismiss the most recent toast.

anatomy.name: Toaster
anatomy.note: Fixed-position container, subscribes to toast store

anatomy.name: Toast
anatomy.note: Individual toast notification with position-aware animation

keyboard.description: Press Escape to dismiss the most recent toast.
